name: Container
description: Center content with padding and max-width
searchText: container center content with padding and max-width @mantine/core /core/container fluid size strategy

props.name: fluid
props.description: If set, the container takes 100% width of its parent and size prop is ignored.

props.name: size
props.description: max-width of the container, value is not responsive – it is the same for all screen sizes. Numbers are converted to rem. Ignored when fluid prop is set.
